Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.scenario

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.scenario
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.runners
 
neqsim.process.safety.cfd
CFD source-term handoff schemas and exporters for safety dispersion studies.
neqsim.process.safety.scenario
Automatic scenario generation for safety analysis.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.scenario used by neqsim.mcp.runners
    Class
    Description
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator
    Automatically generates safety scenarios from equipment failure modes.
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator.EquipmentFailure
    Represents a potential equipment failure.
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator.FailureMode
    Standard equipment failure modes.
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator.HazopDeviation
    Standard HAZOP deviation types.
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator.ScenarioRunResult
    Result of running a single safety scenario.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.scenario used by neqsim.process.safety.cfd
    Class
    Description
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ConsequenceBranch
    Consequence branch for ignition and no-ignition outcomes.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseDispersionScenario
    Result from one automatically generated release-dispersion scenario.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.scenario used by neqsim.process.safety.scenario
    Class
    Description
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator
    Automatically generates safety scenarios from equipment failure modes.
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator.EquipmentFailure
    Represents a potential equipment failure.
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator.FailureMode
    Standard equipment failure modes.
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator.HazopDeviation
    Standard HAZOP deviation types.
    AutomaticScenarioGenerator.ScenarioRunResult
    Result of running a single safety scenario.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    Generates leak source terms and gas dispersion screening scenarios from a process flowsheet.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ConsequenceBranch
    Consequence branch for ignition and no-ignition outcomes.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase
    Built-in release cases for industrial screening taxonomies.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseDispersionScenario
    Result from one automatically generated release-dispersion scenario.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.StreamCandidate
    Stream candidate discovered from the flowsheet.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.WeatherCase
    Named weather case for batch consequence screening.
